rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. Elec. Code §254.1541 governs campaign finance reporting thresholds for general-purpose committees. No overlap.
quote: This section applies only to a general-purpose committee with less than $20,000 in one or more accounts maintained by the committee in which political contributions are deposited
_note: Rule text is unrelated to the proposed change; no conflict exists.
